review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify the implementation changes are limited to creating 'templates/workflows/custom-deploy-pipeline.yaml' and updating the TEAM_COLLABORATION documentation.
Verify the custom workflow demonstrates a mix of ai_execution and bash nodes.
Verify the Team Mode Git Dual-Tiered Synchronization protocol is formalized in the documentation, explaining the pull-model claiming mechanism.
Verify NO implementation of realtime WebSocket/Database sync engines occurred.
Verify NO execution of legacy Python tooling deprecation warnings occurred.
Verify NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics occurred in the commit.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
